no_changes_rationale:
Decomposition only — no implementation in this attempt.

This bead (ddx-4728ae0f) is a Story 6 sub-epic. Its acceptance criterion is "All child beads closed", and the linked plan (/tmp/story-6-final.md) explicitly enumerates six sibling work-slices (B1, B2, B3, B4a, B4b, B4c). No children existed prior to this attempt, so the size-check step from execute-bead instructions applies: file the children, do not implement.

Children created (parent=ddx-4728ae0f):

- ddx-8ec3e08e — B1: wire frontend q to server `search`, fix mediaType wildcard match, add `sort` enum + `staleness` arg with deterministic (sortKey, id) tie-breaker. Cheap. No deps.
- ddx-baa1dbf2 — B2: frontend sort dropdown + staleness chips + URL-state contract (q/mediaType/staleness/sort) + reset `after` on param change. Cheap. Deps: B1.
- ddx-d26f65b2 — B3: publish facet contract (TD-NNN) + add `phase`/`prefix` filter args + chips wired to Story 5 axes. Medium. Deps: B2 (and Story 5 final, tracked externally).
- ddx-cc90cee5 — B4a: TD-NNN search semantics + size caps + binary skip + deterministic ordering + perf benchmark fixture. Strong. Deps: B1.
- ddx-df8b992f — B4b: extend GraphQL `search` to description/frontmatter/body + add `ArtifactEdge.snippet` + resolver tests. Medium. Deps: B4a.
- ddx-297f840c — B4c: frontend snippet rendering + match highlight + e2e for full-text path. Cheap-medium. Deps: B4b.

Dependency edges added: B2→B1, B3→B2, B4a→B1, B4b→B4a, B4c→B4b.
Parent updated with --notes referencing the six child IDs.

Suggested execution order (per plan): B1 → B2 in fast lane; B4a kicks off in parallel; B3 waits on Story 5 final + B2; B4b → B4c gated by B4a.

No source files were modified. No commit produced. The parent epic remains open until all six children close.
